_meta.notes: Master catalog of discovered roles. The daily scan APPENDS new postings here and never deletes, so history is preserved. Per-job Applied/Stop-tracking status lives in the dashboard (browser), keyed by job id, so it survives every regeneration. The 'fit' block is computed against Taylor's resume (see config.json.resume).

jobs.title: Studio QA Director
jobs.notes: Reports to VP Product Dev. Live-service multiplayer, cross-platform PC/console/mobile. Owns QA budget & vendor partnerships.

fit.why: Director-level, live-service multiplayer, owns QA budget + vendor partnerships — a near-exact match to your Fortis/Amazon scope.
fit.blurb: As Director of QA & Localization at Fortis Games, I built a studio-wide QA discipline and automation roadmap for live-service titles from the ground up, and I'm now leading Fortis' AI transformation of QA — using agentic AI and LLMs to target an 80% cut in manual release-test time. That blend of cross-platform live-service ownership and modern AI-driven automation is exactly what scaling competitive titles demands.
